c.f: _xlfn.LET( _xlpm.data,_xlfn._xlws.FILTER('Daily Sales Taco Bell RED'!D:K,(('Daily Sales Taco Bell RED'!I:I<>0)+('Daily Sales Taco Bell RED'!J:J<>0))), _xlpm.memoCol,INDEX(_xlpm.data,,2), _xlpm.locCol,INDEX(_xlpm.data,,5), _xlpm.specialLoc,ISNUMBER(MATCH(_xlpm.locCol,{28841,28843,28844,28845,28846,30256,30491,36224},0)), _xlpm.sortGroup, IF((_xlpm.memoCol="Cash Expected Deposit")*_xlpm.specialLoc,1, IF((_xlpm.memoCol="EBT Expected Deposit")*_xlpm.specialLoc,2,0)), _xlpm.sorted,_xlfn.SORTBY(_xlpm.data,_xlpm.sortGroup,1,_xlpm.locCol,1), _xlfn.HSTACK( INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,1), INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,2), IF(INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,3)=0,"",INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,3)), INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,4), INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,5), IF(INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,6)=0,"",INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,6)), IF(INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,7)=0,"",INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,7)), IF(INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,8)=0,"",INDEX(_xlpm.sorted,,8)) ) )
